rationale.R1.1: The abstract contains an explicit contribution claim and gap statement; sharpening thesis precision and tightening the framing of what is novel is a plausible load-bearing reading of 'stronger' for a scientific text of this type.
rationale.R1.6: Sentence- and paragraph-level prose quality is the other plausible load-bearing reading; in a writing-improvement context 'make this stronger' most commonly signals persuasive force, density, and stylistic clarity rather than structural overhaul.

parsed.clarification_question: By 'stronger,' do you mean primarily improving the prose and sentence-level clarity (writing polish), or sharpening the scientific argument—contribution framing, novelty positioning, and logical rigor?
